Data.Name: Vela's Patched Saddlebag
Data.Description: A rope-tied saddlebag with oil-dark leather and a pocket for the disputed route wafer.

Data.Name: Blacktop Route Wafer
Data.Description: A cracked route wafer carrying the last ride ledger for the Chain Saints succession vote.
Data.FlavorText: It smells faintly of fuel and static.

Data.Name: Saints Ignition Key
Data.Description: A bike key with a red enamel fob, warm from somebody else's pocket.

Data.Name: Dented Reserve Can
Data.Description: A dented reserve fuel can marked by a single red stripe.

Data.Name: Brass Revolver Rounds
Data.Description: A compact stack of road-dusted revolver rounds.

Data.Name: Redbox Scatter Shells
Data.Description: Chunky red shotgun shells in a battered tray.

Data.Name: Matte Brass Revolver
Data.Description: A heavy revolver with a brass cylinder and oil-dark grip.

Data.Name: Latch's Sawn-Off
Data.Description: A compact road shotgun built for ugly conversations at bike length.

Data.Name: Wrapped Torque Wrench
Data.Description: A chrome torque wrench with a red wrapped handle, left where a mechanic can find it fast.

Data.Name: Lifted Amber Visor
Data.Description: A cracked amber visor pushed up just far enough to show Vela is still listening.

Data.Name: Courier Denim Cut
Data.Description: A faded denim cut vest worn under armor, patched with abstract route marks.

Data.Name: Red-Plate Riding Jacket
Data.Description: Black leather with red enamel shoulder plates and road rash along one sleeve.

Data.Name: Throttle Stud Gloves
Data.Description: Studded riding gloves with polished knuckles and tired palms.

Data.Name: Waxed Courier Pants
Data.Description: Waxed cargo riding pants with knee plates scarred by gravel.

Data.Name: Oil-Sole Road Boots
Data.Description: Heavy boots that know every bad stop on the ring road.

Data.Name: Red-Tab Chain Belt
Data.Description: A braided chain belt with a bright red pull tab.

Data.Name: Throttle Sync Nerve Tag
Data.Description: A tiny implant that timestamps acceleration spikes for Rustfinder salvage claims.

Data.Name: Vela Rook
Data.Description: A courier trusted to carry the dead rider's route wafer across a fuel-shrine parley without letting the Chain Saints fracture.

Data.Name: Chrome Jaw Guard
Data.Description: A chrome jaw brace worn like jewelry and warning.

Data.Name: Oil Black Riding Tee
Data.Description: A black riding layer faded where the cut vest sits.

Data.Name: Captain's Denim Cut
Data.Description: A blue denim cut vest crowded with abstract patches and stripped pins.

Data.Name: Captain's Stud Gloves
Data.Description: Black gloves with chrome knuckles and old impact marks.

Data.Name: Captain's Waxed Pants
Data.Description: Riding pants with dull metal knees and a chain bite at the pocket.

Data.Name: Captain's Road Boots
Data.Description: Heavy boots polished only on the toe caps.

Data.Name: Chapter Key Fob
Data.Description: A red enamel fob for the garage everyone pretends is neutral ground.

Data.Name: Road Captain Jaw Frame
Data.Description: A rugged chrome jaw frame with comm pickups buried under the hinge.

Data.Name: Grit Vale
Data.Description: Road captain of the Chain Saints, old enough to know peace is a machine that needs constant maintenance.

Data.Name: Mercy's Cracked Helmet
Data.Description: A battered full-face helmet carried more like a promise than protection.

Data.Name: Medic Denim Cut
Data.Description: A denim cut with patched tool loops and old clinic tape still stuck to the seam.

Data.Name: Oil-Scored Riding Jacket
Data.Description: Armored leather with dull red plates and grease in the stitch holes.

Data.Name: Oil Knuckle Gloves
Data.Description: Studded gloves darkened by fuel, blood, and engine sealant.

Data.Name: Mechanic Waxed Pants
Data.Description: Cargo pants with knee plates and too many tiny pockets.

Data.Name: Pit Road Boots
Data.Description: Heavy boots braced for shop floors and curbside surgery.

Data.Name: Wrapped Torque Wrench
Data.Description: A wrench carried like a professional opinion.

Data.Name: Diagnostic Pulse Bus
Data.Description: A small diagnostic implant tuned for engine rhythm and human pulse.

Data.Name: Mercy Gear
Data.Description: Mechanic-medic who can set a broken collarbone, patch a fuel line, and judge both repairs with the same tired look.

Data.Name: Dark Amber Visor
Data.Description: A cracked visor with rain crust in the seal.

Data.Name: Chain-Strapped Harness
Data.Description: A chain harness worn under armor, loud enough to announce bad news.

Data.Name: Red-Plate Heavy Jacket
Data.Description: Heavy black leather with red enamel plates and no soft edges.

Data.Name: Chrome Knuckle Gloves
Data.Description: Studded gloves built for handlebars and doors that say no.

Data.Name: Latch's Waxed Pants
Data.Description: Riding pants with oil-gloss knees and a torn chain loop.

Data.Name: Latch's Road Boots
Data.Description: Steel-toed boots that do not hurry.

Data.Name: Belted Scatter Shells
Data.Description: A little red shell tray clipped where everyone can see it.

Data.Name: Latch Marrow
Data.Description: Rival enforcer who believes a succession vote is just a fight that learned paperwork.

Data.Name: Borrowed Amber Helmet
Data.Description: A cracked helmet borrowed from someone who might ask for it back.

Data.Name: Prospect Black Tee
Data.Description: A black tee marked by road dust and fresh nerves.

Data.Name: Prospect Denim Cut
Data.Description: A denim cut vest still too clean around the patches.

Data.Name: Borrowed Riding Gloves
Data.Description: Studded gloves a size too large.

Data.Name: Prospect Waxed Pants
Data.Description: Waxed cargos with new knee plates and old mud.

Data.Name: Prospect Road Boots
Data.Description: Heavy boots still learning how to stand still.

Data.Name: Gate Key Fob
Data.Description: A red fob for a gate Pike swears he did not open.

Data.Name: Pike Soren
Data.Description: A nervous prospect posted at the underpass with a smile too quick and a story too rehearsed.

Data.Name: Amber Wake Goggles
Data.Description: Old amber goggles clouded by incense smoke and highway rain.

Data.Name: Wake Keeper Denim Cut
Data.Description: A denim cut vest patched with abstract toll marks and ash-dark thread.

Data.Name: Shrine Leather Jacket
Data.Description: Weathered leather with red plates dulled to rust.

Data.Name: Prayer Stud Gloves
Data.Description: Studded gloves polished smooth along the knuckles.

Data.Name: Waxed Shrine Pants
Data.Description: Oilproof riding pants patched at the knee with old banner cloth.

Data.Name: Wake Road Boots
Data.Description: Boots worn thin at the heel from walking around arguments.

Data.Name: Oil-Stained Wafer Sleeve
Data.Description: An empty evidence sleeve for route wafers and last wishes.

Data.Name: Route Memory Seed
Data.Description: A tiny internal archive that remembers roads after maps stop agreeing.

Data.Name: Oona Brake
Data.Description: An old route priest who keeps the wake ledger, the toll stories, and the names nobody else can say out loud.

Data.Description: A scenario travel point linking this map to another playable area.
